title: Quran, Sura 97: Al-Qadr
description: Sura 97 (Al-Qadr: The Power) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 97 (Al-Qadr: The Power) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: Indeed, We sent it down during the Night of Power. And what can make you know what is the Night of Power? The Night of Power is better than a thousand months.
